form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 6th over 2100m at Feurs, beaten 14m by Lena D'heripre in 4yo fillies race on July 4 at $20. Will find this a tough assignment; prefer later.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start disqualified at Strasbourg on April 6 over 2825m. The run before 8th over 2850m at Laval, beaten 16m by Lio D'avel in 5yo mare handicap on March 28 at $50. Can turn things around in this suitable contest.
